examples: His latest acquisition is a racehorse.
Her father was a well-known racehorse breeder.
I go to give him a kiss—just a peck—and he veers off, jerking his head out of the way like a nervous racehorse.
The two men had once shared ownership of a racehorse, and had counted themselves good friends.
Kinane was full of praise for Rock of Gibraltar, calling him "the ultimate racehorse".
